message:
feat: add btrfs subvolume enumeration and multi-device RAID stripe resolution

ffs-btrfs:
- Expand BtrfsRootItem with generation, root_dirid, flags, refs fields
- Add BtrfsRootRef and BtrfsSubvolume types for subvolume enumeration
- Implement parse_root_ref() for ROOT_REF item parsing
- Add enumerate_subvolumes() to correlate ROOT_ITEM and ROOT_REF entries
- Define ROOT_REF/ROOT_BACKREF item type constants

ffs-ondisk btrfs.rs:
- Add BtrfsRaidProfile enum with all profiles (Single through RAID6)
- Implement from_chunk_type(), data_copies(), is_redundant() methods
- Add map_logical_to_stripes() for multi-device logical-to-physical resolution
- Implement stripe resolvers for mirror, RAID0, RAID10, RAID5/6 profiles
- Add BtrfsDevItem struct and parse_dev_item() for device tree parsing
- Define chunk_type_flags module with all RAID profile bit constants

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
